name: @pablozaiden/devbox
description: CLI to run and expose a devcontainer with SSH agent sharing and a bundled SSH server.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --outfile dist/devbox src/cli.ts && chmod +x dist/devbox
scripts.build:release: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --target=$BUN_TARGET --outfile dist/devbox-$RELEASE_TARGET src/cli.ts && chmod +x dist/devbox-$RELEASE_TARGET
